text: When compressor motor of Chiller 6 at MAIN site fails, what is the temporal behavior of the power input?

tasks.task_description: Analyze power when Chiller 6 compressor motor fails
tasks.agent_name: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
tasks.final_answer: Power consumption may fluctuate or spike before failing.
tasks.review: Task Status: Accomplished | identified temporal behavior to improve tool usage.
